key_features: Managed SEO metadata input fields (meta_title, meta_description, slug, keywords)
Character count indicators for title (70) and description (160)
Auto-slugification with regex normalization (lowercase, special char removal)
Keyword tag management with add/remove functionality
Readability score display with color-coded feedback (green/yellow/red)
Keyword suggestion trigger button with Sparkles icon
dependencies: Custom UI components (Button, Card, Input, Textarea)

changes: Replaced placeholder card with functional calendar view
Added dual filtering system (type and channel dropdowns)
Implemented API data fetching with useCallback and dependencies
Added loading and error state management
Applied client-side filtering via useMemo for filtered display

file_insights.conditional_logic: SEOPanel visible only when isBlogPost is true

patterns_discovered.evidence: Multiple useState calls in CalendarPage and EditorPage for managing filters, loading, and SEO data
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clear separation of concerns and reactive state updates

patterns_discovered.evidence: SEOPanel only renders for blog_post content type via isBlogPost guard

patterns_discovered.pattern: API Data Fetching with Dependency Tracking
patterns_discovered.evidence: useCallback with fetchScheduled dependencies on typeFilter and channelFilter
patterns_discovered.benefit: Automatic refetch when filters change, proper dependency management

patterns_discovered.evidence: useMemo filtering items array based on both type and channel filters
patterns_discovered.benefit: Performance optimization to prevent unnecessary filtering recalculations

patterns_discovered.evidence: Slug input transforms to lowercase and removes special characters via regex
patterns_discovered.benefit: User-friendly slug generation without manual formatting

patterns_discovered.evidence: Keywords array with add/remove functionality and tag UI display
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reusable keyword management pattern for SEO/tagging features

gotchas_discovered.impact: Parent component (EditorPage) must manage SEO state and provide onChange callback
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Clear prop interface makes expectations explicit

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Slug field regex replacement happens on every keystroke
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could cause UX friction if user types special characters expecting validation feedback
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Immediate feedback is provided, but no debouncing implemented

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: CalendarPage filters applied both server-side and client-side
gotchas_discovered.impact: Data fetching uses filters as API parameters AND local filtering in useMemo
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Redundancy ensures safety, but may be over-engineered

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: SEOPanel only shows for blog_post content type
gotchas_discovered.impact: Users editing other content types won't see SEO options - could cause confusion
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Conditional rendering prevents null errors, but no user feedback about why it's hidden

gotchas_discovered.evidence: Comment states 'Save content to calculate score' but no save mechanism shown
gotchas_discovered.impact: Score will remain null until parent component triggers backend calculation

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: onSuggestKeywords callback is optional but not utilized
gotchas_discovered.impact: Button renders with placeholder implementation only

deliverables: ✓ SEOPanel component with all required fields

recommendations.recommendation: Add debouncing to slug field to prevent excessive transformations during typing
Implement slug uniqueness validation via backend API call
Implement onSuggestKeywords callback with backend AI integration
Show message when SEOPanel is hidden (content type not blog_post) to explain why
Memoize TYPE_OPTIONS and CHANNEL_OPTIONS to prevent re-creation on each render
Add unit tests for SEOPanel keyword add/remove functionality and slug transformation
Consider extracting filter logic from CalendarPage into custom hook (useCalendarFilters)
Add error boundary and retry mechanism for CalendarPage API failures
